prerequisites: A Gist account with access to the Integration Settings on your Gist dashboard.

A Gist API Key. Find it in the Integration Settings on your Gist dashboard at https://app.getgist.com/projects/_/settings/api-key. This key grants access to your private contact data, so keep it secret.

authMethods.name: API Key (HTTP Bearer)
authMethods.summary: The connector authenticates with the Gist API using your account API Key, supplied through the required api_key field. Gist performs authentication via HTTP Bearer Auth, sending the key in the request header as 'Authorization: Bearer <API_KEY>'.

setupSteps.title: Locate your API Key in Gist
setupSteps.body: Log in to your Gist account and open the Integration Settings on your dashboard (https://app.getgist.com/projects/_/settings/api-key). Copy the API Key shown there. This key allows access to your private contact data, so do not share it.

setupSteps.title: Configure the connector
setupSteps.body: Paste the copied key into the required api_key field. The connector uses it to authenticate every request to the Gist API via HTTP Bearer Auth (Authorization: Bearer <API_KEY>).

sources.title: Introduction - API & Webhooks Reference, Gist Developer Hub
